violations.text: Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the light shield (ware washing area) has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with black and brown biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Ham and soupy was observed held at 56-58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the ware washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
Freezer door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Inspector observed right side of unit holding an ambient temperature of 47F. Cold-hold units must maintain a temperature of 41F or below. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. TCS foods not to be held in unit until it reaches an ambient temperature of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1) Ceiling vent - ware washing area (dust, dirt) 2) Cart (food residue) 3) Light shields - ware washing area (black debris, previous water damage) New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The floor tile in the front area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The floors in the walk-in freezer area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 10/16/2024

The sugar bin is in poor repair. Sugar bin must be repaired/replaced. The reach-in refrigerator was observed with a leak inside the unit. Leak must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The 3-bay pipe is in poor repair. Pipe is leaking into a container. Leak must be repaired. The handwashing sink near the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. Faucet won't turn off. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The grout near the 3-bay sink, freezers and front area is in poor repair. Grout must be repaired. The floor coving tile behind the ice machine and at the drive-up window are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor tile in the front area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (ice machine) was observed in the warewashing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety managers course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
A coffee pot was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Food was observed held at 50-51 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the prep unit for an unknown amount of time. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Prep unit must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The presence of cockroaches, flies, and rodents are not controlled as evidenced by cockroaches, flies and rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control records state establishment was serviced on 9/30/24. Establishment must continue pest control services until pest issues are controlled. Please email inspector pest control records. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Sugar was observed stored under the 3-bay sink. Food must not be stored in areas subject to splash to prevent contamination. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Cold hold units are lined with cardboard and absorbent pads. Establishment must not line equipment with materials that can't effectively be washed, rinsed, and sanitized to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
Single-service articles (straws) were observed stored on the floor near the bathroom. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the platform that is used to store sugar. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The sugar bin is in poor repair. Sugar bin must be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the inside and outside of equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Equipment must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The 3-bay pipe is in poor repair. Pipe is leaking into a container. Leak must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The handwashing sink near the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. Faucet won't turn off. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The grout near the 3-bay sink, freezers and front area is in poor repair. Grout must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The floor coving tile behind the ice machine and at the drive-up window are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The floor tile in the front area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility, especially under and behind equipment, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (ice machine) was observed in the warewashing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
A dish rag was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Caramel was observed stored on the floor in the front area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The handwashing sink in the ware-washing area is in poor repair. Leak observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The floors under equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
